texto: Because this woman sobbed in the way that all women sob, whether they do it outwardly or whether they keep it silently locked up inside themselves. They sob because they realise, one day, that they were born on a planet of men, and that short of death or spinsterhood they can never escape. Effie's Aunt Rachel used to say, 'Even the slaves could run away, but where can women go?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Graham Masterton que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Because this woman sobbed in the way that all women sob, whether they do it outwardly or whether …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, feminism, sobbing, com foco em luto e sobbing.

texto: Somewhere, all the people we have loved and lost are still among us, in the house that we call history.
explicacao: Citação de Graham Masterton sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Somewhere, all the people we have loved and lost are still among us, in the house that we call hi…” articula reflexao, history, somewhere em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
